brand_identity.name: ORSO RS
brand_identity.mission: Curating the finest Corsican experiences with silent precision.

rules.shadows: Minimal. Use border opacity instead of drop shadows for depth.
rules.glassmorphism: Used sparingly for sticky headers only (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80).

buttons.primary: bg-[#2e2e2e] text-white hover:bg-black rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#2e2e2e] text-[#2e2e2e] hover:bg-[#2e2e2e] hover:text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs
buttons.ghost: text-[#2e2e2e] hover:opacity-70 underline-offset-4 hover:underline uppercase tracking-widest text-xs

cards.property: group relative overflow-hidden bg-white border border-gray-100 hover:border-gray-300 transition-colors duration-300
cards.service: p-8 bg-gray-50 hover:bg-white border border-transparent hover:border-gray-200 transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: border-b border-gray-300 bg-transparent px-0 py-3 focus:border-[#2e2e2e] focus:ring-0 rounded-none placeholder:text-gray-400 font-serif text-lg

navigation.style: Sticky, minimal height. White background with faint border bottom.

visual_enhancers.parallax: Use 'react-scroll-parallax' or subtle CSS transforms for hero images.
visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Images scale 1.05x on hover (duration-700 ease-out). Buttons fill from left.
visual_enhancers.loading_state: Minimalist skeleton loaders in light gray.
visual_enhancers.scroll: Lenis smooth scroll is MANDATORY for the luxury feel.

images.style: High contrast, natural light, Mediterranean sun, architectural symmetry.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for icons. Use thin strokes (stroke-width={1.5}).
Use 'react-day-picker' (via Shadcn) for the booking calendar, styled with square corners.
Ensure the booking bar is sticky on mobile.
Do not use generic 'Lorem Ipsum'. Use real Corsican locations (Porto-Vecchio, Bonifacio, Calvi).
Integrate Beds24 API calls in a dedicated service layer.
Implement the language selector as a simple text toggle (FR / EN), not a dropdown flag menu.
Form inputs must be minimal: underlined style, no heavy borders.
For the 'Services' page, use a split-screen layout: Text on left, sticky image on right.
The footer should be massive (py-32) with a large 'ORSO' watermark.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure #2e2e2e text on white meets AAA standards.
accessibility.aria_labels: Required for all icon-only buttons (search, menu).
